A

addProduct(Product) - Method in class creational.SingletonStore
Adds a single product to the store.
addProducts(List<Product>) - Method in class creational.SingletonStore
Adds multiple products to the store.

C

ClothingFactory - Class in creational
The ClothingFactory class implements the ProductFactory interface.
ClothingFactory() - Constructor for class creational.ClothingFactory
 
createProduct(String, double) - Method in class creational.ClothingFactory
Creates and returns a new Clothing product with the specified name and price.
createProduct(String, double) - Method in class creational.ElectronicsFactory
Creates and returns a new Electronics product with the specified name and price.
createProduct(String, double) - Method in class creational.GroceryFactory
Creates and returns a new Grocery product with the specified name and price.
createProduct(String, double) - Method in interface creational.ProductFactory
Creates and returns a new Product with the specified name and price.
creational - package creational
The creational package contains classes and interfaces for implementing various creational design patterns.

D

displayProducts() - Method in class creational.SingletonStore
Displays all products in the store.

E

ElectronicsFactory - Class in creational
The ElectronicsFactory class implements the ProductFactory interface.
ElectronicsFactory() - Constructor for class creational.ElectronicsFactory
 

G

getInstance() - Static method in class creational.SingletonStore
Retrieves the single instance of the SingletonStore.
getProducts() - Method in class creational.SingletonStore
Retrieves the list of all products in the store.
GroceryFactory - Class in creational
The GroceryFactory class implements the ProductFactory interface.
GroceryFactory() - Constructor for class creational.GroceryFactory
 

P

ProductFactory - Interface in creational
The ProductFactory interface defines a factory method for creating products.

S

SingletonStore - Class in creational
The SingletonStore class represents a store that uses the Singleton design pattern to ensure only one instance of the store exists throughout the application.

U

updateProduct(Product) - Method in class creational.SingletonStore
Updates an existing product in the store or adds it if it doesn't exist.
